title: centaurea solstitialis
intro: Centaurea solstitialis, also known as yellow star-thistle, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, thanks to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Centaurea solstitialis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
